problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Combining Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
